title: BEM-548.5a synthetic regression
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem548_5a')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
contour_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
outbox = Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')
outbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
cycle = 'bem548-5a-synthetic-regression'

records = []
def append(rec):
    records.append(rec)
    with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# External enters through curator only.
intake = {'record_type':'curator_intake','cycle_id':cycle,'trace_id':'bem548_5a_intake','source':'gpt','task_type':'development','title':'BEM-548.5a synthetic regression','objective':'Synthetic regression of full contour with file records only, no live API.','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(base/'curator_intake.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
(base/'curator_intake.json').write_text(json.dumps(intake, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append(intake)
validation = {'record_type':'curator_intake_validation','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'curator','status':'accepted','trace_id':'bem548_5a_intake','validation':{'accepted':True,'blocker':None},'artifact_path':str(base/'curator_intake.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
append(validation)

# Provider probe first: no failure evidence => Claude primary.
probe = {'record_type':'provider_probe_result','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'provider_adapter','provider':'claude','role':'curator','probe_signal':'unknown_no_failure_evidence','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(base/'provider_probe.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
selection = {'record_type':'provider_selection_decision','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'provider_adapter','from_role':'provider_adapter','to_role':'curator','primary_provider':'claude','reserve_provider':'gpt','probe_signal':'unknown_no_failure_evidence','selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'decision':'select_claude_primary_with_probe_required','reason':'no_valid_failure_evidence_for_reserve','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(base/'provider_selection.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
audit = {'record_type':'provider_selection_audit','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'auditor','from_role':'auditor','to_role':'curator','status':'completed','decision':'PROVIDER_SELECTION_AUDITED','selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'reason':'no_valid_failure_evidence_for_reserve','artifact_path':str(base/'provider_selection_audit.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
for name, rec in [('provider_probe.json',probe),('provider_selection.json',selection),('provider_selection_audit.json',audit)]:
    (base/name).write_text(json.dumps(rec, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    append(rec)

assignment = {'record_type':'curator_assignment','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'curator','from_role':'curator','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','decision':'submit_to_orchestrator','reason':'intake_validated_and_provider_selected','artifact_path':str(base/'curator_assignment.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
(base/'curator_assignment.json').write_text(json.dumps(assignment, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append(assignment)

steps = [
  ('analyst','curator_assignment','curator_assigned_development_task_to_orchestrator','analysis','analyst_plan.md',None),
  ('auditor','analysis','analysis_completed_requires_audit','audit','auditor_review.md','PASS_TO_EXECUTOR'),
  ('executor','audit','audit_pass_to_executor','execution','executor_artifact.md',None),
  ('auditor_final','execution','execution_completed_requires_final_audit','audit','final_audit.md','FINAL_PASS'),
  ('curator_closure','audit','final_audit_pass_returns_to_curator','final_result','curator_closure.md',None)
]
seq=[]
for idx, (role, input_type, reason, output_type, filename, decision_value) in enumerate(steps, start=1):
    decision = {'record_type':'role_orchestrator_decision','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'role_orchestrator','from_role':'role_orchestrator','to_role':role,'status':'completed','decision':'route_to_'+role,'reason':reason,'input_record_type':input_type,'artifact_path':str(base/('orchestrator_decision_'+str(idx)+'.json')),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
    (base/('orchestrator_decision_'+str(idx)+'.json')).write_text(json.dumps(decision, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    append(decision)
    seq.append(role)
    artifact = base/filename
    artifact.write_text('# BEM-548.5a ' + filename + '\n\nSynthetic regression artifact created after orchestrator decision `' + role + '`.\n')
    rec = {'record_type':output_type,'cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':role if role != 'curator_closure' else 'curator','to_role':'role_orchestrator' if role != 'curator_closure' else 'external_gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(artifact),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
    if decision_value:
        rec['decision'] = decision_value
    append(rec)

# Telegram synthetic delivery.
outbox_record = {'record_type':'telegram_hourly_report','cycle_id':cycle,'delivery_mode':'synthetic_regression','canonical':True,'status':'queued_for_sender','message':'BEM-548.5a synthetic regression PASS candidate | 2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)','blocker':None,'security':'no token in file'}
with outbox.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(outbox_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append(dict(outbox_record, record_type='telegram_outbox_delivery_test', artifact_path='governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl', commit_sha=None))
delivery = {'record_type':'telegram_delivery_result','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'telegram_sender_synthetic','from_role':'telegram_sender','to_role':'curator','status':'sent_synthetic','outbox_line':'synthetic','message_hash':'synthetic_bem548_5a','attempt':1,'retry_allowed':False,'next_retry_at':None,'artifact_path':str(base/'telegram_delivery_result.json'),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'}
(base/'telegram_delivery_result.json').write_text(json.dumps(delivery, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append(delivery)

expected = ['analyst','auditor','executor','auditor_final','curator_closure']
ok = seq == expected and selection['selected_provider'] == 'claude' and delivery['status'] == 'sent_synthetic'
blocker = None if ok else {'code':'BEM548_5A_SYNTHETIC_REGRESSION_FAILED','sequence':seq}

role_state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
role_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'
role_state['cycle_id'] = cycle
role_state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED' if ok else 'BLOCKED'
role_state['active_role'] = 'curator'
role_state['next_role'] = None
role_state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-548.5a','title':'Synthetic regression','status':'completed' if ok else 'blocked'}
role_state['blocker'] = blocker
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
provider_state = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}
provider_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'
provider_state['last_synthetic_regression'] = {'cycle_id':cycle,'selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False}
provider_state['blocker'] = None
provider_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(provider_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
contour = json.loads(contour_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if contour_path.exists() else {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)'
contour['bem548_5a_synthetic_regression'] = {'status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','sequence':seq,'provider':'claude','telegram':'sent_synthetic','blocker':blocker}
contour['blocker'] = blocker
contour_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem548_5a_synthetic_regression.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-548.5a | Synthetic Regression | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:03 (UTC+3)\n\n## Проверка\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| Curator intake | accepted | curator_intake_validation |\n| Provider | Claude selected, reserve_used=false | provider_probe_result + provider_selection_decision |\n| Orchestrator | ' + ' -> '.join(seq) + ' | role_orchestrator_decision records |\n| Telegram | sent_synthetic | telegram_delivery_result |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem548_5a_synthetic_regression.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-548.5a ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': sequence=' + '->'.join(seq) + ', telegram=' + delivery['status'] + '\n')
changed_files.extend([str(transport), str(outbox), str(role_state_path), str(provider_state_path), str(contour_path), str(report), str(proof)])
for p in base.iterdir():
    changed_files.append(str(p))
ops_applied.append('BEM-548.5a synthetic regression completed')
"""
No issue comments.
